allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Complete KEXP MCP Server

- ✨ Dual protocol support (MCP + HTTP REST API)
- 🛠️ 10 comprehensive tools for KEXP data access
- 🚀 Multiple deployment configurations (Railway, Vercel, Render, Docker, etc.)
- 📚 Complete documentation and deployment guides
- 🔧 TypeScript implementation with full type safety
- 🌐 CORS support and error handling
- 📊 Health checks and monitoring ready
- 🎵 Full KEXP API v2 integration

Features:
- Current play tracking
- Recent plays with configurable limits
- Search functionality
- Host and program information
- Show details and metadata
- ID-based detailed lookups

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix Railway deployment: Include package-lock.json and update Dockerfile

- Include package-lock.json for npm ci compatibility
- Update Dockerfile to use npm install for better compatibility  
- Fix .gitignore to allow package-lock.json tracking

Fixes Railway auto-deploy build failures.")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix TypeScript build in Docker deployment

- Install all dependencies including dev for building TypeScript
- Build project with tsc, then remove dev dependencies 
- Update Railway config with NODE_ENV setting
- Ensures TypeScript compiler is available during build phase

Fixes ''tsc: not found'' build errors on Railway.")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix Claude connector authentication issue

- Add explicit ''authentication: none'' to connector configs
- Create proper OpenAPI 3.0 schema (claude-connector.yaml)
- Add comprehensive Claude connector setup guide
- Clarify that KEXP API requires no authentication

Fixes ''Couldn''t register with KEXP V2 sign-in service'' error.
Issue was Claude assuming OAuth when API is public.")
